title: polyarrhena reflexa subsp. brachyphylla
intro: Polyarrhena reflexa subsp. brachyphylla, also known as the Australian sarsaparilla, is a plant species that belongs to the Polygalaceae family and is native to Australia. The Australian sarsaparilla has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving arthritis and other joint-related pain, as well as treating digestive issues and skin conditions. The Australian sarsaparilla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, and it is also used in some traditional remedies for its purported health benefits.
